title: rubus calvus
intro: Rubus calvus, also known as the dwarf or naked raspberry, is a deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus calvus include its ability to aid in the treatment of various health conditions, such as arthritis, digestive issues, and skin problems. Herbal preparations of Rubus calvus can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
